name: Little Meat Pies1
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large Dutch oven, combine shortening and flour; cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until roux is caramel colored.
2. Add pork, beef, onion, parsley, and seasonings. Cook over medium heat until meat is browned, stirring to crumble.
3. Drain and cool.
4. Divide Meat Pie Pastry into 22 equal portions. Roll out each portion into a 5-inch circle.
5. Place about 2 tablespoons of meat mixture in the center of each circle, and fold pastry in half.
6. Moisten edges with water, and press with a fork to seal.
7. Fry pies in 1 inch hot oil (375 degrees) until browned, turning once. Drain on paper towels.
8. Yield: 22 pies.
